title: Front Office Manager - AirAsia India - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - AirAsia India - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
AirAsia India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Front Office Manager to join our dynamic team in Madurai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About AirAsia India:
AirAsia India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Revenue Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AirAsia India!
